claudeLoginDescription: Claude Code is installed. Log in to connect your account. Once logged in, type /exit to close.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters.
skipPermissionsDescription: Skips permission prompts when running Claude and Codex agents.
networkDescription: Choose which networks can reach purplemux. You can change this later in Settings > System.
networkFootnote: If you go through a reverse proxy, tunnel, or Tailscale Serve, "Localhost only" is enough.

localhost.label: Localhost only (recommended)
localhost.hint: Personal use on this machine, or access via Tailscale Serve / nginx / Cloudflare Tunnel.

tailscale.label: Localhost + Tailscale
tailscale.hint: Connecting from another device by Tailscale IP directly (e.g. http://100.x.x.x:8022).

all.label: All interfaces
all.hint: Anyone reachable on your LAN or the public internet can try to connect.
